_instructions: 12 cities × 5 high-ticket categories = 60 searches/week = 240/month (within 250 free SerpAPI limit). Leave 10 searches buffer for retries.
_categories_rationale: High-Ticket Urgency verticals only. A rank drop costs these businesses $1K-$50K+ in lost leads. Low-ticket (cafes, florists) ignored.
